✦ 10 May 2026 · Mother's Day ✦

For Mum,
my whole heart.

There is no one like you. There never will be. Today I celebrate the woman who made me who I am.

🌸 Happy Mother's Day
🎂 & Happy Birthday, Mum!
Scroll
Her story

The woman I look up to

Us Two of a kind
Always radiant Beauty inside and out
Your love Giving your whole heart
Your Hustle She never stops
Your Parenting A mother like no other
Her world Building something every day
A letter

Words I mean

Dear Mum,

I look at these photos and I see everything — your strength in every shift at the market, your joy in every smile, your love in every moment you spent showing up for us even when it was hard. You never let us see the weight you carried. That alone tells me everything about who you are.

You hustle harder than anyone I know. You love deeper than anyone I know. You are both the foundation this family stands on and the warmth that makes it feel like home.

Today — whether it is your birthday, Mother's Day, or both (and yes, Mum, we know you can't quite decide between May and October 😄) — I want you to know: you are seen, you are celebrated, and you are so, so deeply loved.

Thank you for everything, Mum. Everything.

With all the love I have — your child 💛
The list

Reasons I love you

01

Your Hustle

You work harder than anyone I have ever seen. Every day, no excuses, no complaints. That is strength.

02

Your Heart

The way you love your children is a gift I will never take for granted. Fierce, patient, unconditional.

03

Your Grace

You carry yourself with dignity wherever you go. You make every room feel warmer just by being in it.

04

Simply You

Not what you do, not what you provide — just you. The person. That has always been enough.

🎂 Bonus celebration

Happy Birthday,
Mum 🎉

Whether you celebrate on 10 May or 5 October — you deserve a celebration every day in between. Two dates for one extraordinary woman sounds exactly right.

10 May 2026 · Or 5 October — you choose, Mum 😄
♥

Made with love — just for you, Mum.

10 May 2026 · Mother's Day
